announcements.title: sf-pi v0.24.0 — peerDependencies `@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent` floor raised to `>=0.72.0`. Users on pi <…
announcements.body: peerDependencies `@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent` floor raised to `>=0.72.0`. Users on pi < 0.72 will see extensions skip with a one-line warning pointing to `pi update`. — adopt pi 0.72 thinkingLevelMap + per-model baseUrl; expose Opus 4.7 xhigh

announcements.title: sf-pi is compatible with pi 0.71 (Gemini CLI / Antigravity removed)
announcements.body: pi 0.71 removed built-in Gemini CLI and Antigravity providers. sf-pi does not use them, so upgrading pi is safe. Set PI_CODING_AGENT_SESSION_DIR to relocate session storage (pi ≥ 0.71).
